message:
feat(python): numpy.iscomplexobj wrapper parity (franken_numpy-8n2j)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.iscomplexobj(x) returning True
iff input has a complex dtype, regardless of imaginary-part values.
Test covers real float array, integer array, complex array, complex
scalar, real scalar, list of floats, list of complex, nested 2-D
complex, and complex array with all-zero imag (still complex dtype).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
